title: Asking for directions
explanation:
Asking for directions

Listen to someone asking how to get to the station.

Transcript

Tourist: Excuse me, where is the train station?
Local: Go straight ahead and turn left at the traffic lights.
Tourist: Straight ahead and left at the lights?
Local: Yes. The station is on your right.
Tourist: Thank you very much!

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The tourist wants to find the [*train station|airport|hotel].
They should turn left at the [*traffic lights|shop|bank].
questions.feedback: Turn left at the traffic lights.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The tourist says: '____ me...' | *Excuse | Help | Listen
Turn ____ at the traffic lights. | *left | straight | station
The station is on your ____. | *right | ahead | excuse
The tourist says ____ very much. | *Thank you | Please | Sorry

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The tourist repeats the directions to [*check|forget|ignore] them.
questions.feedback: Straight ahead and left at the lights?

questions.text: There are [*two|one|three] main steps in the directions.
